worthSeeing.title: Iskanderkul Lake:
worthSeeing.text: Stunning blue-green glacial lake in the Fan Mountains named after Alexander the Great.

worthSeeing.text: Remote corridor of ancient Silk Road history and breathtaking mountain scenery.
